<div><b><span style="font-size: 15px">Screentimee outbursts:</span></b><span style="font-size: 15px">- Yes, weŐve observed a pattern: after using her iPad, our daughter tends to become more emotional, often resulting in outbursts from time to time.</span></div>
<div><span style="font-size: 15px"><br></span></div>
<ul>
<li><span style="font-size: 15px">Remembering, breaking a habit and noticing your emotional response</span></li>
</ul>
<div><img style="max-width: 100%; max-height: 100%;" src="data:image/png;base64,"/><span style="font-size: 15px"><br></span></div>
<ul class="Apple-dash-list">
<li><span style="font-size: 15px">Get her clothes ready at night</span></li>
<li><span style="font-size: 15px">ask Ella to try to get dressed on her own first and then proceed to assist if she pushes back</span></li>
</ul>
